objective.problem: Decide whether individually weak IdrEvent signals form a credible campaign when their order and infrastructure relationships are evaluated together.
objective.decision_target: Advisory IntelligenceFinding (campaign probability + ranked entities + evidence event IDs) consumed by idr-sentinel deterministic corroboration.
success_metrics: Held-out ROC-AUC / PR-AUC / Brier under chronological 60/20/20 splits
S6+GNN hybrid must beat or match every ablation variant on Brier under the same split
Every finding carries evidence_event_ids resolvable to source telemetry

constraints: Advisory boundary: model output must never trigger PanicResponse; idr-sentinel corroborates against primary telemetry first
Latent state is never an auditable substitute for source events; evidence IDs are mandatory in findings
Chronological splits only; no training on future information relative to prediction time
Synthetic benchmark results must never be presented as production detection accuracy
python >= 3.11; deps: numpy, torch >= 2.2, scikit-learn; GPL-3.0-or-later

sources: NDJSON streams of idr_common::IdrEvent from idr-main; synthetic matched campaigns from simulator.py
schemas: IdrEvent: {id, timestamp, source, severity, kind{type,...}, metadata} — validated in schema.py
provenance: Simulator seeds are deterministic; event IDs are seed-derived UUIDs

outputs: IntelligenceFinding JSON (pipeline.py): campaign_id, escalation_probability, predicted_next_stage (rule-based), related_entities, evidence_event_ids, model_version, graph_nodes, graph_relations

components.role: entity extraction, typed edges, 20-dim feature vector
temporal graph: per-entity histories, normalized adjacency, evidence provenance

interfaces.name: IdrEvent
interfaces.contract: canonical tagged shape from idr_common; kind must contain 'type'

interfaces.name: checkpoint
interfaces.contract: dict {state_dict, feature_dim, hidden_dim, state_dim}; v1 raw state dicts still load with dims inferred from tensor shapes and static.* keys dropped

interfaces.name: TemporalGraph
interfaces.contract: node_ids, sequences [N,steps,20], mask, symmetric degree-normalized adjacency, evidence_ids per node, relation_counts

interfaces.name: IntelligenceFinding
interfaces.contract: see outputs; predicted_next_stage is a heuristic lookup, not learned

decisions.decision: Advisory-only integration; findings feed idr-sentinel, never actuate responses
Explicit per-step S6 scan chosen for auditability over throughput in v0.1
Masked max-pools fill with -inf so isfinite guards genuinely zero all-padding rows (was -1e9 no-op)
Ablation variants construct only the submodules they use, keeping parameter counts honest
Checkpoints carry their own dimensions; CLI must not hardcode hyperparameters
campaign_id derives from chronologically first event, independent of caller ordering
Push CI restricted to main; PR commits build once via pull_request trigger
mypy follows the running interpreter version; pinning 3.11 breaks against numpy 2.5 PEP 695 stubs on newer Pythons

completed: v0.1.0 package merged to main (PR #2); CI lint fix (PR #5); Ocean Reef takeoff migrated out to LeeLupton/pricing (PR #4, pricing#1)
Review follow-ups + test hardening (4->14) + docstrings + mypy gate (PR #6)
active: Design-improvement roadmap synthesis (workflow wf_d3f88161-a42): 4 lenses -> 3-judge panel -> phased roadmap; integrate output into tasks.blocked as sequenced workstreams
Adversarial diff verification of PR #6 batch (workflow wf_75195b07-5f8); fold upheld findings into risks.defects
blocked: Roadmap workstreams: populated from wf_d3f88161-a42 output once it completes

commands_run.result: end-to-end pass incl. checkpoint v2 roundtrip

tests: tests/test_system.py: 14 tests — schema validation/rejection, graph symmetry, 4-path gradients, evidence retention, ablation smoke, checkpoint roundtrip + legacy load, CLI roundtrip + bad-line, campaign_id order-invariance, padding finiteness

benchmarks.roc_pr: all four variants saturate at 1.0 (synthetic separability, not capability)

assumptions: Simulator class separability makes ranking metrics uninformative at n=80; only calibration (Brier) separates variants
predicted_next_stage is a 4-rule lookup presented alongside model output; consumers must not read it as learned
uncertainty: No real labeled campaigns yet; production accuracy unknown
Homogeneous message passing: relation types counted but not used in propagation
Adjacency accumulates over the whole scoring window with no time decay or versioning
delta_seconds feature is the global inter-event gap, not per-entity

artifacts.role: Arch container CI: install, import check, pytest, ruff, mypy

latest_event.summary: PR #6 merged; main green end-to-end (pytest+ruff+mypy); README badges live; design-roadmap and diff-verify workflows in flight
